# Blue Staffy UK: Your Trusted UK Blue Staffy Breeders.: Hey there! We&#039;re the team behind BSUK – Blue Staffy UK, and if you&#039;re as head-over-heels for Staffordshire Bull Terriers as we are, then you&#039;re in the right place. Based right here in Glasgow, at 40 Coltmuir St, Glasgow G22 6LU, we&#039;re more than just a place to find Staffy puppies; we&#039;re a family of dedicated enthusiasts committed to raising healthy, happy, and well-adjusted Blue Staffy pups for loving homes across the entire United Kingdom.
